ChakraTab.EmptyTechniques: Drag & drop Technique items here to add them.

WeaponAttackIssues.Malformed: "{prefix}" must be an object or use dotted "{prefix}.*" keys

MasteryStep.Label: Mastery
MasteryStep.Hint: Mastery step 0–5. Step 1+ adds a Perform bonus (to the perform roll and threshold); step 2+ also adds an effective-level offset to @cl (duration, range, damage…).

Master.MasteredHint: This technique is mastered at the maximum step.

Subtype.Label: Subtype(s)
Subtype.Hint: Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple subtypes.

HandSeals.Label: Hand Seals
HandSeals.Hint: Requires forming hand seals. Blocked while grappled or pinned.

HalfSeals.Label: Half Seals
HalfSeals.Hint: Requires partial hand seals. Blocked while grappled or pinned.

Mobility.Label: Mobility
Mobility.Hint: Requires freedom of movement. Armor may cause failure.

MaterialFocus.Label: Material Focus
MaterialFocus.Hint: Requires a material component or focus item.

Empower.Label: Empower
Empower.Hint: Can spend additional chakra to enhance effect.

PhysicalHealth.Label: Physical Health
PhysicalHealth.Hint: Requires the user to be in good physical condition.

Blocked.Grappled: You cannot perform hand seals while grappled or pinned.
Blocked.Health: Your physical condition prevents the use of this technique.

Perform.Failed: Perform check failed. Your action is wasted but no chakra is spent.

Empower.Title: Empower Technique
Empower.Hint: Spend additional chakra to enhance this technique's effect.
Empower.Label: Extra Chakra

Chakra.Insufficient: Insufficient chakra to perform this technique.

Technique.ActiveHint: Changes below apply to the bearer only while this technique is Active.
Technique.DuplicateDictKey: A dictionary flag with that key already exists.

Prerequisites.Label: Prerequisites
Prerequisites.Hint: Other techniques or feats that must be learned first.

Supplements.Label: Supplements
Supplements.Hint: Related items that travel alongside this technique.

Children.Label: Children
Children.Hint: Items granted by this technique when learned.

AutomaticBuffs.Name: Automatic Technique Buffs
AutomaticBuffs.Hint: Automatically apply buff items to targets when a technique is successfully performed.

CustomBuffCompendia.Name: Custom Buff Compendia
CustomBuffCompendia.Hint: Comma-separated compendium pack IDs to search in addition to naruto-d20.technique-buffs (e.g. my-module.extra-buffs).

EnforceLearning.Name: Enforce Technique Learning
EnforceLearning.Hint: When enabled, unlearned techniques cannot be performed until learned.

LearningProgressionMode.Name: Technique Learning Progression
LearningProgressionMode.Hint: Choose whether learning uses book-style attempts or one roll per 4-hour training block.

LearnMarginInclusive.Name: Inclusive Learn Margin
LearnMarginInclusive.Hint: When enabled, a success margin of exactly 5 counts for the better learning result. The margin 15 boundary is always inclusive.

DeductLearningChakra.Name: Deduct Training Chakra
DeductLearningChakra.Hint: When enabled, technique learning deducts training chakra from temp chakra first and then Pool. Reserve is never consumed automatically because Tap Reserves must be used manually.

LowReserves.Name: Low Reserves
LowReserves.Hint: Your chakra reserve is running low. You are fatigued.

ChakraDepletion.Name: Chakra Depletion
ChakraDepletion.Hint: Your chakra is critically depleted. You are exhausted and recover only a fraction of your pool on rest.

PromptVariant.Label: Prompt variant selection when multiple variants exist

VariantDialog.Title: Select Buff Variant
VariantDialog.Hint: Multiple variants found. Choose which buff to apply.

Automation.NoTargets: No targets selected for buff application.
Automation.NoPermission: No permission to modify {name}. Buff not applied.

App.LearnWithEmpathyTooltip: Learn this technique — spends Empathy Points equal to its Skill Threshold (shown)

Notifications.EquipToUse: Equip this technique on an actor to use it.
Notifications.BuffAutomationFailed: Buff automation failed for {name}. See console.
Notifications.OnlyTechniqueDrop: Only Technique items can be dropped here.
Notifications.TrainingChakraRequired: {actor}: learning requires {amount} training chakra, but only {available} is available.
Notifications.EquipToLearn: Equip this technique on an actor to learn it.
Notifications.NoPermissionUpdate: {actor}: you do not have permission to update this actor.
Notifications.SkillRankRequired: {actor}: at least 1 rank in {skill} is required to learn {name}.
Notifications.LearnDataNotReady: {actor}: learn check data for {skill} is not ready.
Notifications.CouldNotReadRoll: {name}: could not read learn roll total.
Notifications.CannotAddActionPoint: {name}: cannot add an Action Point to this learn roll (already spent, learned, or superseded by a newer roll).
Notifications.NotEnoughEmpathy: {actor}: not enough Empathy Points to learn {name} (need {cost}, have {have}).
Notifications.TapMinimum: Amount to tap must be at least 1.
Notifications.NoWeaponAttack: {actor}: no valid weapon or attack found for {name}.
Notifications.ChargeDefenseFailed: Charge defense penalty automation failed. See console.
Notifications.EquipToMaster: Equip this technique on an actor to master it.
Notifications.NotLearnedForMastery: {name}: must be learned before it can be mastered.
Notifications.AlreadyMaxMastery: {name}: already at the maximum mastery step (5).
Notifications.MasterySkillRequired: {actor}: {name} has no mapped discipline skill, so it cannot be mastered.

Perform.Failed: Perform check failed (DC {dc}). No chakra spent.

Learn.TrainingDisciplinePrompt: Choose which discipline this Training technique uses for learn checks.
Learn.ChooseDisciplineFirst: choose discipline on first learn attempt
Learn.TrainingInterruptedLead: More than 30 days passed since the last training block. Learning progress is lost before the new attempt.
Learn.EmpathyLead: Learned by spending {cost} Empathy Points ({remaining} remaining).
Learn.NoSkillLead: {discipline} has no mapped learn skill yet, so this technique is treated as learned for phase 1.
Learn.CheckReset: {ap}Learn check {total} vs DC {dc}. Attempts {used}/{max}; progress is lost and the run starts over.

Master.TrainingInterruptedLead: More than 30 days passed since the last training block. Mastery progress is lost before the new attempt.
Master.StepAchievedLead: {ap}Mastery check {total} vs DC {dc}. Reached mastery step {step}.
Master.CheckReset: {ap}Mastery check {total} vs DC {dc}. Attempts {used}/{max}; progress toward step {step} is lost and the run starts over.
